title: elaeocarpus simaluensis
intro: Elaeocarpus simaluensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as the Simalu tree or the Mountain Apple tree. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves and fruits of Elaeocarpus simaluensis are used in various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing fever, relieving cough, and boosting the immune system. Furthermore, the plant is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, skin infections, and wounds, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
